githubNote: CSS source files live in src/data/styles and are served via /api/styles. The API can be pointed at a GitHub raw URL by changing STYLES_SOURCE / the resolver in src/lib/styles.ts.

styles.name: Pulse Glow Button
styles.description: A call-to-action button with an expanding pulsing glow halo.

styles.name: Gradient Shift Button
styles.description: Button with a multi-color gradient that flows continuously.

styles.name: Neon Button
styles.description: Cyberpunk-style neon outline that floods with light on hover.

styles.name: 3D Press Button
styles.description: Chunky 3D button that physically depresses when clicked.

styles.name: Shine Sweep Button
styles.description: Dark button with a glossy light sweep on hover.

styles.name: Liquid Button
styles.description: Pill button with a liquid blob that expands behind it on hover.
